title: [FIRRTL] IMCP produces incorrect results with aggregate
body:
```scala
circuit Foo:
  module Bar:
    input in: UInt<1>[2]
    output out: UInt<1>
    wire a: UInt<1>
    a <= in[0]
    out <= a
  module Foo:
    input a: UInt<1>[2]
    output b: UInt<1>
    inst bar of Bar
    bar.in <= a
    b <= bar.out
```

`$ firtool -preserve-aggregate=1d-vec foo.fir`

produces the incorrect result:
```
module Bar(
  output out);

  assign out = 1'bx;
endmodule
```
